version_description: For intermediate players, set to original key, using chord progression based on what I hear in this video reference: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gq-4vIIJO30 -- fairly simple main loop, tried to shift chords for musical rather than textual readability.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: This version has improved chords based on the original song and has better formatting compared to the previous.

content:
Cheat sheet:

[Verse]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Chorus]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Bridge]
[ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch]
[ch]Emaj7[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] (4x)

------

Full version:

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Dm/A[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
           It felt like springtime[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
On this February morning in a courtyard birds were singing your[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
praise.      I'm still recalling things you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
said to make me feel all right. I carry them with me today now[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
As I lay me down to sleep, this I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
pray - That you will hold me dear.  Though I'm far a-[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
way I`ll whisper your name  into the[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
sky. And I will wake up happy[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
I wonder why      I feel so high though I am[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
not above the sorrow, heavy-hearted till you call my[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
name.   And it sounds like church bells or the whistle of a[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
train on a summer evening I want to meet you barefoot, barely breathing[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
As I lay me down to sleep, this I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
pray - That you will hold me dear.  Though I'm far a-[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
way I`ll whisper your name  into the[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
sky. And I will wake up happy. Oh darling,[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
As I lay me down to sleep, this I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
pray - That you will hold me dear.  Though I'm far a-[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
way I`ll whisper your name  into the[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
sky. And I will wake up happy[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Db[/ch]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
  It`s not too near for me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gb[/ch]                [ch]Db[/ch]
Like a flower I need the rain though it's not[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
clear to me, every season has its change[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch] (4x)
And I will see you when the sun comes out again[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
As I lay me down to sleep, this I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
pray - That you will hold me dear.  Though I'm far a-[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
way I`ll whisper your name  into the[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
sky. And I will wake up happy[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
As I lay me down to sleep, this I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
pray - That you will hold me dear.  Though I'm far a-[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
way I`ll whisper your name  into the[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
sky. And I will wake up happy[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
   I wonder why[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
        Mmm,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
the sun comes out again, when the sun comes out again[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
When the sun comes out again, When the sun comes out, ohh[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
the sun comes out again, when the sun comes out again,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Mmm, comes out, comes out 'n' out, ooh, oh,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
wake up happy       so I pray...[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
(ad nauseam)[/tab]
